summary_en: 145,800 shares acquired for ¥378.96M (0.19% of S/O) in open-market purchases on TSE during May 11–31, 2026. Cumulative total under the May 8, 2026 board resolution (750,000 share limit, ¥2.0B ceiling, execution window May 11–Oct 9, 2026). 19.4% of share count and 18.9% of yen limit consumed.
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition Status of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: NSD (ticker 9759, TSE Prime) filed notice on June 1, 2026 disclosing treasury stock acquisition activity. During the period May 11–31, 2026 (on an executed-trade basis), the company purchased 145,800 shares for a total of ¥378,959,900 via open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. These acquisitions were conducted under the board resolution of May 8, 2026, which authorized repurchases of up to 750,000 shares (0.99% of outstanding shares) for an aggregate amount not to exceed ¥2.0 billion, with an execution window of May 11–October 9, 2026. As of the date of this notice, the cumulative acquisition under that authorization stands at 145,800 shares and ¥378,959,900 consumed, representing approximately 19.4% of the authorized share count and 18.9% of the authorized yen limit.
